subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Scene of Transcendent Glory! O Abu-Talib and Ghulam-Husayn, upon both of you be the Glory of God, the Most Glorious, and His praise. In a letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بمنظر اکبر جناب ابوطالب و غلامحسین علیهما بهاء الله الابهی و ثنائه در تحریری
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
